posts.author: eitanal (Eitan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
Is it possible to add a Confirmation Dialog step on Automation run after clicking a button?
Example: When a button was clicked, before running the webhook/automations steps,
present a Confirmation Dialog with editable text and only if the user clicked “Yes” continue with the recipe step.
Is there any workaround do get a similar behavior?
Thanks
Eitan

posts.author: NicoMutert (Nico Mutert)
posts.cookedHtml: That would be a great feature, I hope somebody can tell or maybe give a workaround. Kind regards from Germany! - Nico
